name: Ushuaia, Argentina
description: MV Hondius departed Ushuaia with 147 passengers and crew from 23 nationalities on April 1, 2026.

name: South Georgia Island
description: MV Hondius waypoint during Antarctic expedition route.

name: Tristan da Cunha
description: MV Hondius stopped at Tristan da Cunha April 13–15. One island resident later suspected of exposure.

name: Saint Helena
description: Body of Case 1 removed to Saint Helena. Case 2 (Dutch female) disembarked. 30 total passengers disembarked. Case 2 subsequently boarded Airlink flight to Johannesburg.

name: Ascension Island
description: Case 3 (British male, pneumonia) medically evacuated from Ascension Island to South Africa ICU on approximately April 27.

name: Praia, Cape Verde
description: Ship docked at Praia, Cape Verde on May 3. No disembarkation — local facilities insufficient. PCR posthumously confirmed Case 2.

name: Tenerife, Canary Islands
description: MV Hondius arrived Tenerife May 10. All passengers disembarked May 11. UK passengers flown to Manchester; U.S. passengers to Offutt AFB. WHO DG Tedros present.

name: Rotterdam, Netherlands
description: MV Hondius en route to Rotterdam following all-passenger disembarkation at Tenerife.

name: Johannesburg, South Africa — Case 2 (Death)
description: Case 2 (Dutch female) died at Johannesburg emergency department on April 26. She had disembarked at Saint Helena and boarded Airlink flight before deteriorating en route. PCR posthumously confirmed Andes virus.

name: Johannesburg, South Africa — Case 3 (ICU)
description: Case 3 (British male) medically evacuated from Ascension Island to South Africa ICU approximately April 27. PCR confirmed hantavirus May 2.

name: Zurich, Switzerland
description: Swiss case confirmed by Geneva University Hospitals on May 5. Passenger who disembarked Saint Helena April 24. Complete genome sequence ANDV/Switzerland/Hu-3337/2026 published May 8.

name: Leiden UMC, Netherlands
description: One or more confirmed ANDV cases evacuated from MV Hondius/Tenerife to Leiden University Medical Centre.

name: Radboud UMC, Nijmegen, Netherlands
description: Confirmed ANDV patient at Radboud UMC. On May 12, 12 hospital staff placed in precautionary quarantine after an incorrect blood sampling procedure was followed with the confirmed patient.

name: Amsterdam UMC, Netherlands
description: KLM flight attendant from KL592 (Johannesburg → Amsterdam) hospitalized at Amsterdam UMC. Attendant was on the flight when Case 2 was aboard for 45 minutes before removal.

name: Paris, France
description: French female passenger confirmed positive for Andes virus. ANRS France activated Level 1 Emergency Response on May 7.

name: Madrid, Spain
description: Spanish male with preliminary positive ANDV test as of May 11. Confirmation pending.

name: Arrowe Park Hospital, Wirral, UK
description: 22 UK passengers and crew (19 passengers, 3 crew) flown from Tenerife to Manchester and placed in 72-hour quarantine at Arrowe Park Hospital, followed by 45-day home isolation.

name: Nebraska Medicine / UNMC Biocontainment Unit, Omaha
description: U.S. repatriation passengers transferred to UNMC: 15 to quarantine unit, 1 confirmed positive to biocontainment unit. Part of 18 total U.S. passengers from repatriation flight.

name: Emory University Hospital, Atlanta
description: 2 U.S. repatriation passengers transferred to Emory University Hospital. On May 12, Emory patient (mildly symptomatic) tested NEGATIVE for hantavirus.

name: Arizona (Phoenix)
description: Arizona Department of Health Services monitoring 1 passenger who disembarked at Saint Helena.

name: California (Sacramento)
description: California Department of Public Health monitoring 4 persons: 3 passengers and 1 flight contact.

name: Georgia (Atlanta)
description: Georgia monitoring 2 repatriated passengers. 1 Emory patient tested negative May 12.

name: Kansas (Topeka)
description: Kansas KDHE monitoring 3 residents identified as high-risk close contacts.

name: Maryland (Annapolis)
description: Maryland DOH monitoring 2 flight contacts.

name: Nebraska (Lincoln)
description: Nebraska monitoring 16 repatriated passengers. 1 confirmed asymptomatic positive in UNMC biocontainment unit.

name: New Jersey (Trenton)
description: NJDOH monitoring 2 residents identified as flight contacts.

name: Texas (Austin)
description: Texas DSHS monitoring 2 passengers who returned before the outbreak was declared.

name: Virginia (Richmond)
description: Virginia Department of Health monitoring passengers and contacts. Number TBD.

name: Washington (Olympia)
description: Washington State DOH and King County monitoring 3 residents: 2 flight contacts and 1 passenger.

name: New York (Albany)
description: NY State DOH confirmed 3 NY residents aboard: NYC, Orange County, and Westchester County.
source: New York State Department of Health

name: Saint Helena — Airlink Flight Origin
description: Airlink flight departed Saint Helena Airport with 82 passengers and 6 crew on April 25. Case 2 (confirmed ANDV, died April 26) was aboard. South African health ministry conducted full passenger contact tracing.

name: Johannesburg — KLM KL592 Origin
description: KLM KL592 (also codeshare AF8282 / DL9560 / SK6855) departed Johannesburg OR Tambo at 11:15 PM April 25. Case 2 was aboard for 45 minutes before removal. Dutch GGD contacted all passengers.

name: Amsterdam — KLM KL592 Destination
description: KLM KL592 arrived Amsterdam Schiphol. KLM flight attendant subsequently hospitalized at Amsterdam UMC with mild symptoms.

name: Offutt AFB, Omaha — U.S. Repatriation Flight Destination
description: U.S. Government charter flight from Tenerife arrived Offutt Air Force Base May 11 with 18 passengers (17 Americans + 1 British dual national). 1 mildly positive and 1 mildly symptomatic traveled in aircraft biocontainment units.
